h1.visual_description: Large, bold, serif font, preceded by a numeric identifier. Significant whitespace above and below.

h2.visual_description: Not present in sample, but expected to be smaller bold serif or italicized bold.

visual_matchers.pattern: Small numeric superscript within body text
Text at the bottom of the page separated by a horizontal rule, starting with a small number

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numeric superscript linked to footer citations; footers use author/title/page-range format.

margin_noise_patterns.header_right: Author surname in all caps (e.g., YARROW)
